message:
The other day, I found myself rummaging through a box in the attic and stumbled upon some old board games. It instantly took me back to family game nights filled with laughter and playful competition. We decided to take a break from our screens and have a game night, but it spiraled into more than just fun; it reminded us how important it is to have a plan in case of emergencies, too. 

While we were laughing over Monopoly, I realized we hadn't revisited our fire escape plan in ages. So, after the last roll of the dice, we gathered around the table and went over our smoke alarm checks and escape routes. It felt good to combine a little low-tech fun with something essential for our family's safety. 

Have you ever rediscovered a simple joy that turned into something meaningful? This little refresher helped us, and I'd love to hear your thoughts!
